of the main focuses would be just kind of pruning the content on your blog.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, clarify processes, and plan for the engagement renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Workflow:** To prevent missed reviews, Rimkus will now add a "done reviewing" comment in Google Docs. Aida will reset the status of 4 articles to re-trigger notifications.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**Content Categorization:** New content will be published as "Articles" (e.g., `rimkus.com/articles`) to align with the existing structure for technical resources not authored by specific Rimkus experts.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Engagement Renewal:** The renewal decision is due next week. Aida will provide a summary of Phase 1 results and a proposal for Phase 2, which will focus on pruning and refreshing existing content to improve overall site SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**Content Audit:** The audit of all existing articles is due next week. GrowthX will recommend removing outdated sales enablement content (e.g., regional campaigns) to improve site quality signals for search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** Rimkus missed review notifications for 4 articles because the automated status update was triggered by simply opening the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**Solution:** Rimkus will now add a "done reviewing" comment in each Google Doc to confirm completion. Aida will reset the status of the 4 missed articles to re-trigger notifications.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

### Content Categorization

  - [**Decision:** New content will be published as "Articles" (e.g., `rimkus.com/articles`), not "Blog Posts."](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This aligns with Rimkus's existing structure for technical resources and avoids potential SEO issues from using a new subfolder.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

### Content & SEO Performance

  - [**Live Content:** 5 articles published Monday are already indexed by Google.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [**Significance:** Fast indexing is a strong positive signal, indicating Google perceives the content as high-quality and relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [Impressions and clicks should appear in the Looker dashboard next week.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [GrowthX is resolving an AWS-related error preventing Google Search Console data from loading into the dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Content Pipeline & Quality

  - **Review Batch \#2:** 5 articles are with Rimkus for review.
  - **Review Batch \#3:** 5 articles are with GrowthX's editor and will be sent to Rimkus by tomorrow.
  - [**Writing Guidelines:** Updated based on Rimkus feedback (e.g., no second-person address). Rimkus should continue to flag any issues for continuous improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Image Strategy

  - [**AI-Generated Images:** GrowthX is exploring AI-generated images to create unique visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [**Initial Challenge:** AI-generated humans looked "Play-Doh-like."](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [**New Direction:** Focus on abstract or distant architectural/construction imagery, which is easier for AI to generate realistically and aligns with Rimkus's preference to avoid human photos.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [**Rimkus-Provided Images:** Rimkus can provide high-impact, real-world photos for specific articles (e.g., NYC facade inspections), but the internal approval process is slow.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

### Existing Content Audit & Pruning

  - [**Audit Status:** The audit of all existing articles is due next week.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**Pruning Strategy:** GrowthX will recommend removing outdated sales enablement content (e.g., regional campaigns) that is factually incorrect and has no SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This improves overall site quality signals for search engines, making it easier for new, valuable content to rank.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

### Engagement Renewal

  - [**Timeline:** The renewal decision is due next week.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**Proposal:** Aida will provide a Notion document by Friday with:](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
      - [A summary of Phase 1 results.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
      - [A proposal for Phase 2, focusing on pruning and refreshing existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [Reset the status of the 4 missed articles in the content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - Send Batch \#3 articles to Rimkus for review by tomorrow.
      - [Deliver the Phase 1 summary and Phase 2 proposal via Notion by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/F86zkwDZiLzQBXyxGezFYTjsFYtxnspM?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
